_README: Ground-truth annotations per extractionId. groundTruth = total visible module slots in the photo (RCD = 2, main switch = 2, blanks counted as 1 each). null = needs review. Add notes when count is non-obvious.

1777441303200-92evuu.notes: Wylex NHRS12SL split-load. Recounted from labels: 1 small leftmost MCB + 2× NSB16 + 3× NSB32 + RCD(2) + 1× PSB32-C + 5× NSB06 + main_switch(2) = 16. Initial guess of 15 missed the leftmost MCB.

1777454064331-nxw2u3.notes: Hager (model null). Counted: RCD(2) + 4 left MCBs + 3 blanks + 5 right MCBs + main_switch(2) = 16. Verified with Derek 2026-04-29.
